description: Platform-wide rules for automations. Edit via admin API or this file on the server — not shown to end users in Intake.
complianceNotes: No cold DMs or mass outreach without explicit per-project approval. No false, absolute, or fear-based claims. Respect regional laws (GDPR, CAN-SPAM, PIPL, etc.) from regions-catalog. Child-safety products: privacy-first messaging only.
contentRules: Do not promise guaranteed signups, revenue, or rankings
Use assistive language (help, support) not guarantees
Disclose beta / AI-assisted content where platforms require it
Child or family products: no scare tactics; no minors' PII in marketing forms
